mapper.insert: INSERT INTO ai_file_index ( file_id,user_id,parse_status,summary,tags,model_name, parse_error,chunk_count,create_time,last_update_time ) VALUES ( #{bean.fileId},#{bean.userId},#{bean.parseStatus},#{bean.summary},#{bean.tags},#{bean.modelName}, #{bean.parseError},#{bean.chunkCount},#{bean.createTime},#{bean.lastUpdateTime} ) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE parse_status = VALUES(parse_status), summary = VALUES(summary), tags = VALUES(tags), model_name = VALUES(model_name), parse_error = VALUES(parse_error), chunk_count = VALUES(chunk_count), last_update_time = VALUES(last_update_time)
mapper.update:
UPDATE ai_file_index
parse_status = #{bean.parseStatus},
summary = #{bean.summary},
tags = #{bean.tags},
model_name = #{bean.modelName},
parse_error = #{bean.parseError},
chunk_count = #{bean.chunkCount},
last_update_time = #{bean.lastUpdateTime},
WHERE file_id = #{fileId} AND user_id = #{userId}
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM ai_file_index WHERE file_id = #{fileId} AND user_id = #{userId}
